name: hotbee-api-skills
description: Open Agent Skills and one-command CLI for HotBee API workflows.

scripts.test: node ./bin/hotbee-skills.mjs install --dry-run && node ./bin/hotbee-skills.mjs call image2 --dry-run --prompt "生成一张小红书封面" && node ./bin/hotbee-skills.mjs call douyin --dry-run --text "解析这个视频的播放量 https://v.douyin.com/xxxx/"
